title: Malviya Nagar hotel fire: Arrested cook Kesar Negi moves Saket court for bail
description: Kesar Negi, the cook who was arrested by Delhi Police in the recent Malviya Nagar hotel fire case, has moved a petition seeking bail before a Saket court.A total of 22 people, including 13 foreigners, were killed in Malviya Nagar’s Hauz Rani area last week in a fire incident at Flourish Stays B&B. Besides hotel owner Lovkesh Bajaj, cook Negi was arrested over allegations of negligence.However, Negi in his plea before the South district court has alleged that he is being made a scapegoat for
